status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.

status.description: A patch for this issue has been uploaded to JIRA by a contributor.
status.name: Patch Available

worklogs.comment:
amahussein opened a new pull request #2695:
URL: https://github.com/apache/hadoop/pull/2695


   [MAPREDUCE-7141: Allow KMS generated spill encryption keys](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/MAPREDUCE-7141)
   Add KMS support to generate key for the encryption of the spilled data on disk. The feature improves fault tolerance to AM failures/re-runs and also gives another option to the client on how it wants the keys to be created.
   The current implementation assumed that the KMS key can be retrieved from the DFS.
   
   


----------------------------------------------------------------

To respond to the message, please log on to GitHub and use the
URL above to go to the specific comment.

For queries about this service, please contact Infrastructure at:
users@infra.apache.org

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

fields.description: Currently the only way an encryption key for task spills is generated is by the AM's key generator. This JIRA tracks the work required to add KMS support to this key's generation allowing fault tolerance to AM failures/re-runs and also give another option to the client on how it wants the keys to be created.
fields.summary: Allow KMS generated spill encryption keys
